scope: Curated balanced matrix for Qwen3.6 27B 4-bit quality sensitivity across temperature/top-p and config cells (prefill_step_size, max_seq_nums). Inference-under-test is direct shared_bench.py through /Users/jeffreycruz/Development/LLM_INFERENCE/mlx-engine/.venv-py312/bin/python with --runs 3. No exhaustive combinatorics.

cells.label: A_baseline
cells.description: Baseline (already produced by m29-balanced-qwen36-4bit-8bit-quality-comparison). temp=0.0, top-p=1.0, default config. Citation only.

cells.label: B_sampling_07_09
cells.description: Temperature/top-p sampling sensitivity: temp=0.7, top-p=0.9. Otherwise default. Single-cell probe of how deterministic-quality reference/rubric scoring behaves under typical sampling.

cells.label: C_prefill_4096
cells.description: prefill_step_size sensitivity: explicit 4096. Otherwise deterministic baseline.

cells.label: D_max_seq_2
cells.description: max_seq_nums sensitivity: explicit 2. Otherwise deterministic baseline.

excluded_or_deferred_cells.label: E_combined_07_09_prefill_4096_maxseq_2
excluded_or_deferred_cells.reason: Skipped to avoid combinatorial blowup and keep balanced-but-limited scope. Combinatorial 2x2x2 sweep is out of scope; the curated 3 new cells already cover temperature, prefill_step_size, and max_seq_nums separately.

excluded_or_deferred_cells.label: Qwen3.6_27B_8bit_cells
excluded_or_deferred_cells.reason: Out of scope. The m29-balanced-qwen36-4bit-8bit-quality-comparison feature already produced a 8-bit baseline at temp=0.0, top-p=1.0. Repeating the full 3-cell matrix on 8-bit would roughly double evidence-collection time and the 4-bit 27B already covers the temperature/config sensitivity signal.

excluded_or_deferred_cells.label: Other_models
excluded_or_deferred_cells.reason: Out of scope. The feature is explicitly Qwen3.6 quality sensitivity.

evidence_requirements_per_cell: Row-error check: every row error: null
quality_score.py deterministic score (mean_score and per-prompt pass_rate)
Per-prompt avg TTFT, decode TPS, total latency
no_default_change_statement: This feature is a quality-sensitivity sweep. It records inspect/score/latency evidence per cell. It does not propose default changes, promotion, or any engine behavior change. Single-sample wins are not promotion evidence.
